symptom: Pagination endpoint returned an empty array instead of the next page when cursor pointed past the final record.
rootCause: The query builder treated a missing cursor row as zero results and returned [] instead of null, causing the consumer to assume no more pages existed even when records remained.
userImpact: Consumers of the orders endpoint stopped paginating early and missed records, resulting in incomplete data on downstream dashboards.
recommendedPrevention: Add a contract assertion that the endpoint always returns either a populated page with a next-cursor or null; add a regression test that exercises end-of-stream cursor behaviour.

preventionArtifacts.description: Asserts end-of-stream returns next=null rather than an empty page.
Tightens the orders response shape so empty pages with non-null cursors fail validation.
